entities.name: PNP_LOCATION_INTERFACE
entities.description: A pointer to a structure that contains pointers to various routines of the interface. The PnpGetLocationString routine provides the device-specific portion of the SPDRP_LOCATION_PATHS property for a device.

entities.name: PS_CREATE_NOTIFY_INFO
entities.description: 结构已扩展为包含一个 IsSubsystemProcess 成员，该成员指示 Win32 以外的子系统。其他成员（如 FileObject、ImageFileName、CommandLine）指示有关子系统进程的其他信息。有关这些成员的行为的信息，请参阅 SUBSYSTEM_INFORMATION_TYPE。

entities.name: ExAllocatePoolPriorityZero
entities.description: Allocates pool memory with zero initialization and priority. This is a wrapper around ExAllocatePoolWithTagPriority that ensures memory is zero-initialized.

entities.name: InsertTailList

entities.name: IoAttachDeviceToDeviceStack
entities.description: Attaches a device object to the device stack. IoAttachDeviceToDeviceStack determines the current top of the device stack and attaches the new device object to the top of the device stack.

entities.name: IoCallDriver
entities.description: Passes an I/O request packet (IRP) to the appropriate driver for processing.

entities.name: IoCancelIrp
entities.description: Cancels a specified I/O request packet (IRP). If the IRP has already completed, the caller must free it.

entities.name: IoCopyCurrentIrpStackLocationToNext
entities.description: Copies the current IRP stack location to the next stack location in the I/O request packet (IRP). This function is typically used by drivers that pass IRPs down the driver stack.

entities.name: IoCsqInsertIrp
entities.description: Inserts an IRP into a driver's cancel-safe IRP queue. Drivers can use IO_CSQ_IRP_CONTEXT to dequeue the same IRP.

entities.name: IoCsqRemoveIrp
entities.description: Removes a specific IRP from the cancel-safe IRP queue. Drivers may need to remove IRPs from the queue based on specific conditions.

entities.name: IoCsqRemoveNextIrp
entities.description: Removes the next IRP from a driver's cancel-safe IRP queue. Drivers can use this routine or implement their own IRP queuing and dequeuing mechanisms.

entities.name: IoCompleteRequest
entities.description: Completes an I/O request packet (IRP) with the specified priority boost. This function is typically called by drivers to indicate completion of an I/O operation.

entities.name: IoFreeIrp
entities.description: Frees an I/O request packet (IRP) that was allocated by IoAllocateIrp.

entities.name: IoFreeMdl
entities.description: Releases an MDL (Memory Descriptor List). If the physical pages described by the MDL are locked, the MmUnlockPages routine should be called before IoFreeMdl to unlock the pages. IoFreeMdl automatically unmaps the pages when releasing the MDL.

entities.name: IoGetDeviceProperty
entities.description: Retrieves device properties from the specified device object.

entities.name: IoIs32bitProcess
entities.description: Determines if the current I/O request originates from a 32-bit user-mode application. Returns TRUE if the process is 32-bit.

entities.name: IRP_MJ_SHUTDOWN
entities.description: 大容量存储设备的驱动程序必须在 DispatchShutdown 例程中处理此请求。如果驱动程序维护数据的内部缓冲区，则必须处理此请求。收到关闭请求表示文件系统驱动程序正在发送系统关闭通知。PnP 管理器在任意线程上下文中的 IRQL<=APC_LEVEL 发送此 IRP。在完成关闭请求之前，驱动程序必须完成当前缓存在设备中或保存在驱动程序内部缓冲区中的任何数据的传输。驱动程序不会收到对设备对象的 IRP_MJ_SHUTDOWN 请求，除非它注册到 IoRegisterShutdownNotification 或 IoRegisterLastChanceShutdownNotification。

entities.name: KeRegisterBugCheckReasonCallback

entities.name: KeRestoreExtendedProcessorState

entities.name: DMA_OPERATIONS

entities.description: 结构包含指向驱动程序在其设备上执行 DMA 操作时必须使用的函数的指针表。函数只能通过此数据结构中的指针访问。这些例程替换以前版本的 Windows NT 中支持的 HalXxx 例程。为了确保兼容性，Wdm.h 和 Ntddk.h 头文件提供具有过时名称的宏，但新驱动程序应始终通过此数据结构访问。

entities.name: BUS_INTERFACE_STANDARD
entities.description: Defines a standard bus interface structure used by drivers to access bus-specific functionality without relying on bus numbers. Drivers typically obtain this interface by sending IRP_MN_QUERY_INTERFACE requests to PCI bus drivers at PASSIVE_LEVEL and storing the structure in non-paged pool memory.

entities.name: D3COLD_SUPPORT_INTERFACE
entities.description: Interface routines to determine device D3cold capabilities and enable devices to use D3cold. The two main routines in this interface are SetD3ColdSupport and GetIdleWakeInfo. This interface handles scenarios like unexpected wake-ups (transition to D0) when another device on the same power rail requests transition from D3cold to D0.

entities.name: DEVICE_DESCRIPTION
entities.description: Contains fields related to DMA devices or drivers. Some fields may be unused by certain drivers (e.g. BusNumber in WDM drivers). Drivers should set relevant members and zero others. ScatterGather field should not be TRUE unless device can wait for DMA controller reprogramming.

entities.name: FILE_POSITION_INFORMATION
entities.description: Contains file position information used by file system drivers.

entities.name: IO_CONNECT_INTERRUPT_PARAMETERS
entities.description: Contains parameters for connecting an interrupt. Includes pointers to driver's device extension, interrupt service routine, interrupt resource descriptor, physical device object, and driver-specified context.

entities.name: IO_ERROR_LOG_PACKET
entities.description: The IO_ERROR_LOG_PACKET structure contains error logging information for drivers. The ErrorCode member specifies the NTSTATUS value of the error. The DumpData member contains any dump data for the log entry, which is a variable-sized array whose size is specified by the DumpDataSize member. Drivers use the StringOffset member to specify the beginning of the first insertion string, and the NumberOfStrings member specifies the number of strings. Each insertion string is a null-terminated Unicode string.

entities.name: IO_SECURITY_CONTEXT
entities.description: 结构体，包含与文件创建操作相关的安全上下文参数。成员包括 DesiredAccess（访问掩码）、Options（打开句柄选项）、ShareAccess（共享访问类型）等，对应于 ZwCreateFile 函数的参数

entities.name: IO_STACK_LOCATION
entities.description: The IO_STACK_LOCATION structure represents an I/O stack location in an I/O request packet (IRP). It contains parameters and context information for IRP processing.

entities.name: KBUGCHECK_REASON_CALLBACK_RECORD
entities.description: Structure used by KeRegisterBugCheckReasonCallback and KeDeregisterBugCheckReasonCallback routines for accounting. Must be allocated in resident memory such as non-paged pool. Initialize the structure using KeInitializeCallbackRecord routine before use. Available on Windows XP with SP1, Windows Server 2003 and later versions. Header: Ntddk.h.

entities.name: KBUGCHECK_SECONDARY_DUMP_DATA
entities.description: 的 InBuffer 成员指向一个小缓冲区供例程使用。 InBufferLength 成员指定缓冲区的大小。 如果要写入的数据量小于 InBufferLength，则回调例程可以使用此缓冲区向系统提供故障转储数据。 然后，回调例程将 OutBuffer 设置为 InBuffer ， 将 OutBufferLength 设置为写入缓冲区的实际数据量。 必须写入大于 InBufferLength 的数据量的驱动程序可以使用其自己的缓冲区来提供数据。 必须在执行回调例程之前分配此缓冲区，并且必须驻留在常驻内存 (，例如非分页池) 。 然后，回调例程将 OutBuffer 设置为指向驱动程序的缓冲区，将 OutBufferLength 设置为缓冲区中要写入故障转储文件的数据量。 要写入故障转储文件的每个数据块都使用 KBUGCHECK_SECONDARY_DUMP_DATA 结构的 Guid 成员的值进行标记。 使用的 GUID 对于驱动程序必须是唯一的。 若要显示与此 GUID 对应的辅助转储数据，可以在调试器扩展中使用 .enumtag 命令或 IDebugDataSpaces3：：ReadTagged 方法。 有关调试器和调试器扩展的信息，请参阅 Windows 调试。 驱动程序可以将具有相同 GUID 的多个块写入故障转储文件，但这种做法非常糟糕，因为调试器只能访问第一个块。 注册多个 KbCallbackSecondaryDumpData 例程的驱动程序应为每个回调分配唯一的 GUID。 使用 KeRegisterBugCheckReasonCallback 注册 KbCallbackSecondaryDumpData 例程。驱动程序随后可以使用 KeDeregisterBugCheckReasonCallback 例程删除回调例程。 如果驱动程序可以卸载，则必须删除其 DRIVER_UNLOAD 回调函数中的任何已注册回调例程。 KbCallbackSecondaryDumpData 例程在可以执行的操作方面受到非常限制。 有关详细信息，请参阅 Bug 检查回调例程限制。 实现 KbCallbackTriageDumpData 回调例程 从 Windows 10 版本 1809 和 Windows Server 2019 开始，内核模式驱动程序可以实现 KbCallbackTriageDumpData 类型的KBUGCHECK_REASON_CALLBACK_ROUTINE回调函数，以标记虚拟内存范围以包含在雕刻的内核微型转储中。 这可确保小型转储将包含指定的范围，以便可以使用在内核转储中工作的相同调试器命令来访问它们。 目前，这是针对“雕刻”的小型转储实现的，这意味着捕获了内核或更大的转储，然后从较大的转储创建了一个小型转储。 默认情况下，大多数系统都针对自动/内核转储进行配置，并且系统会在崩溃后下次启动时自动创建一个小型转储。 系统在 ReasonSpecificData 参数中传递指向 KBUGCHECK_TRIAGE_DUMP_DATA 结构的指针，该结构包含有关 Bug 检查的信息，以及驱动程序用来返回其初始化和填充的数据数组的 OUT 参数。 在以下示例中，驱动程序配置会审转储数组，然后注册回调的最小实现。 驱动程序将使 用 数组将两个全局变量添加到小型转储。 C++ #include <ntosp.h> // Header definitions // // The maximum count of ranges the driver will add to the array. // This example is only adding max 3 ranges with some extra. // #define MAX_RANGES 10 // // This should be large enough to hold the maximum number of KADDRESS_RANGE // which the driver expects to add to the array. // #define ARRAY_SIZE ((FIELD_OFFSET(KTRIAGE_DUMP_DATA_ARRAY, Blocks)) + (sizeof(KADDRESS_RANGE) * MAX_RANGES)) // Globals static PKBUGCHECK_REASON_CALLBACK_RECORD gBugcheckTriageCallbackRecord; static PKTRIAGE_DUMP_DATA_ARRAY gTriageDumpDataArray; // // This is a global variable which the driver wants to be available in // the kernel minidump. A real driver may add more address ranges. // ULONG64 gDriverData1 = 0xAAAAAAAA; PULONG64 gpDriverData2; // Functions VOID

entities.name: KE_PROCESSOR_CHANGE_NOTIFY_CONTEXT
entities.description: Contains processor add operation status, the processor number of the new processor to be added, and the NTSTATUS code associated with the indicated status. When a new processor is added to a hardware partition, the operating system calls the registered callback function twice - first with KeProcessorAddStartNotify status before starting the new processor, then again with either KeProcessorAddCompleteNotify (if successful) or KeProcessorAddFailureNotify status. If KE_PROCESSOR_CHANGE_ADD_EXISTING flag is specified during registration, the callback is also called immediately for each currently active processor in the hardware partition.

entities.name: REG_POST_OPERATION_INFORMATION
entities.description: Contains a pointer to the corresponding pre-notification structure. When a RegistryCallback routine receives this structure, its CallContext member matches that of the pre-notification structure. The CallContext members of these structures are available starting with Windows Vista. Allows assigning context information to registry key objects.

entities.name: SECURITY_SUBJECT_CONTEXT
entities.description: 结构是一种不透明结构，表示发生特定操作的安全上下文。 驱动程序不得修改或尝试直接访问此结构的任何成员以做出安全决策。 相反，为了避免授权中的安全问题，请将此不透明结构传递给 SeAccessCheck 或 SePrivilegeCheck 的调用。 标头： Wdm.h。 包括： Wdm.h、 Ntddk.h、 Ntifs.h。

entities.name: SLIST_ENTRY
entities.description: Defines a singly linked list entry structure. Used with interlocked singly linked list functions.

entities.name: DEVICE_POWER_STATE
entities.description: Specifies the power state of a device.

entities.name: FILE_INFORMATION_CLASS
entities.description: Specifies the type of file information being queried or set. Used with ZwQueryInformationFile and ZwSetInformationFile routines.

entities.name: IO_ALLOCATION_ACTION
entities.description: Specifies the action to be taken by a driver's ControllerControl routine when allocating a controller. Drivers must provide this value when calling IoAllocateController.

entities.name: IRQ_DEVICE_POLICY

entities.description: PO_FX_PERF_STATE_UNIT 说明

entities.name: POWER_ACTION
